name: @n8n/web
description: Static web landing page for the n8n monorepo baseline.

scripts.dev: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 4173 -d dist
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp index.html styles.css main.js animations.js performance-budget.json dist/
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
